groups.name: Help Desk
groups.description: First line of support handling general issues and password resets.

groups.name: Service Desk
groups.description: Front-line service request intake and routing.

groups.name: Application Support
groups.description: Application troubleshooting, configuration, and minor bug fixes.

groups.name: Network Team
groups.description: Connectivity, VPN, firewall, switches and routers.

groups.name: Field Support
groups.description: On-site hardware support, laptops, printers and peripherals.

groups.name: Security Team
groups.description: Identity, access governance and security incidents.

groups.name: Application Owners
groups.description: Product owners and engineers responsible for application bug fixes and root cause analysis.

tickets.title: BSOD on workstation
tickets.description: Blue screen "MEMORY_MANAGEMENT" several times per day.
tickets.resolution: Replaced defective RAM module identified via memtest.

history.notes: Replaced defective RAM module identified via memtest.

tickets.title: Outlook crashes on startup
tickets.description: Outlook 2019 crashes immediately after splash screen. Safe mode works.
tickets.resolution: Disabled corrupted COM add-in and updated Outlook to latest CU.

history.notes: Disabled corrupted COM add-in and updated Outlook to latest CU.

tickets.title: Cannot login to portal
tickets.description: SSO returns 401 when trying to access the company portal.
tickets.resolution: Cleared stale SSO session and re-synced AD attributes.

history.notes: Cleared stale SSO session and re-synced AD attributes.

tickets.title: Application error on ERP
tickets.description: User receives error code ERP-5021 when posting invoices in the ERP module.
tickets.resolution: Applied vendor patch ERP-2026.04. Posting now successful.

history.notes: Applied vendor patch ERP-2026.04. Posting now successful.

tickets.title: Report generation failure
tickets.description: BI report times out after 10 minutes. Affecting end-of-month closing.
tickets.resolution: Optimized SQL query and increased report timeout. Job completes in 2 minutes.

history.notes: Optimized SQL query and increased report timeout. Job completes in 2 minutes.

tickets.title: BSOD on workstation
tickets.description: Blue screen "MEMORY_MANAGEMENT" several times per day.
tickets.resolution: Replaced defective RAM module identified via memtest.

history.notes: Replaced defective RAM module identified via memtest.

tickets.title: Printer offline
tickets.description: Network printer shows offline in Windows. Printer panel reports ready.
tickets.resolution: Reinstalled print driver and reconfigured TCP/IP port.

history.notes: Reinstalled print driver and reconfigured TCP/IP port.

tickets.title: BSOD on workstation
tickets.description: Blue screen "MEMORY_MANAGEMENT" several times per day.
tickets.resolution: Replaced defective RAM module identified via memtest.

history.notes: Replaced defective RAM module identified via memtest.

tickets.title: Wi-Fi disconnects intermittently
tickets.description: Wireless drops every 10-15 minutes on floor 4.
tickets.resolution: Replaced access point on floor 4 and adjusted channel plan.

history.notes: Replaced access point on floor 4 and adjusted channel plan.

tickets.title: Password reset
tickets.description: User locked out after multiple failed login attempts.
tickets.resolution: Account unlocked and temporary password issued through self-service.

history.notes: Account unlocked and temporary password issued through self-service.

tickets.title: Outlook crashes on startup
tickets.description: Outlook 2019 crashes immediately after splash screen. Safe mode works.
tickets.resolution: Disabled corrupted COM add-in and updated Outlook to latest CU.

history.notes: Disabled corrupted COM add-in and updated Outlook to latest CU.

tickets.title: Password reset
tickets.description: User locked out after multiple failed login attempts.
tickets.resolution: Account unlocked and temporary password issued through self-service.

history.notes: Account unlocked and temporary password issued through self-service.

tickets.title: Slow network performance
tickets.description: High latency reported when accessing internal SharePoint. Pings spike above 500ms.
tickets.resolution: Replaced faulty SFP on edge switch. Latency restored to baseline.

history.notes: Replaced faulty SFP on edge switch. Latency restored to baseline.

tickets.title: Email not syncing
tickets.description: Outlook client stuck on "Updating Inbox". OWA works correctly.
tickets.resolution: Recreated Outlook profile and rebuilt OST. Mail flowing normally.

history.notes: Recreated Outlook profile and rebuilt OST. Mail flowing normally.

tickets.title: VPN connectivity issue
tickets.description: User reports being unable to establish a VPN tunnel from the corporate client. Authentication succeeds but no internal resources are reachable.
tickets.resolution: Reset VPN profile and pushed updated split-tunnel routes. User confirmed access restored.

history.notes: Reset VPN profile and pushed updated split-tunnel routes. User confirmed access restored.

tickets.title: Computer does not power on
tickets.description: Workstation shows no LED activity when pressing power button. Power outlet verified working.
tickets.resolution: Replaced faulty power supply unit. Workstation boots correctly.

history.notes: Replaced faulty power supply unit. Workstation boots correctly.

tickets.title: Password reset
tickets.description: User locked out after multiple failed login attempts.
tickets.resolution: Account unlocked and temporary password issued through self-service.

history.notes: Account unlocked and temporary password issued through self-service.

tickets.title: Application error on ERP
tickets.description: User receives error code ERP-5021 when posting invoices in the ERP module.
tickets.resolution: Applied vendor patch ERP-2026.04. Posting now successful.

history.notes: Applied vendor patch ERP-2026.04. Posting now successful.

tickets.title: Access denied to shared drive
tickets.description: User cannot open the Finance shared folder. Was working yesterday.
tickets.resolution: Re-added user to FIN-RW security group. Access verified.

history.notes: Re-added user to FIN-RW security group. Access verified.
